📚

How to Use Chat‑p2p V9

Quick guide to get you started

🚀 Getting Started

Welcome to Chat‑p2p V9 — a fully serverless messaging app with a redesigned interface, smoother scrolling, and a better experience across all devices.

1️⃣

Choose a Room Name

Enter any room name (e.g., general, friends, team-project). Anyone with the same room name can join the conversation.

2️⃣

Pick Your Display Name

Choose a name that others will see. You can use your real name or a fun nickname — make it memorable!

3️⃣

Hit Join

Click the Join button and you're in! The V9 UI loads instantly with no delays.

💡

Pro Tip: Browse Rooms

Click Browse Rooms to discover active conversations in parallel — room discovery is faster in V9.

💬 Messaging Basics

The V9 composer is redesigned with a pill-shaped send button and smooth animations. Here are the essentials.

⌨️

Send Messages

Type and press Enter to send, or Shift + Enter for a new line. The send button glows when ready.

@

Mention Someone

Type @username to ping someone directly. They'll see a badge and their mention is highlighted in the bubble.

↩️

Reply & Edit

Hover a message and click Reply to thread it, or Edit to update your own messages inline.

⬇️

Scroll-to-Bottom FAB

New in V9! A floating button appears when you scroll up. Tap it to instantly jump back to the latest message.

🎤 Voice & Media Sharing

V9 improves media reliability with exponential-backoff retries and API fallback, so your files always load.

🎙️

Record Voice Messages

Tap the microphone button to record. On mobile: hold to record, slide up to lock, slide left to cancel.

📷

Share Photos & Videos

Tap the 📎 attachment button to upload images and videos. V9 fixes video memory leaks for smooth playback.

📄

Send Files

Share documents (PDF, DOC, TXT) and archives (ZIP, RAR). Large files use chunked upload with automatic retry.

🖼️

View Media Gallery

Click any image or video to open the fullscreen viewer. Navigate with arrow buttons or swipe on mobile.

⚡ V9 Advanced Features

Chat‑p2p V9 ships major improvements to layout, scrolling, and interface polish across all platforms.

🎨

Redesigned UI (Inter Font)

V9 uses the Inter typeface with a new dark gradient theme, animated message bubbles, and a polished composer bar.

📐

Cross-Platform Layout Fix

V9 uses 100dvh viewport units and safe-area insets so the layout fits perfectly on iOS, Android, and desktop — no more clipped keyboards.

⬇️

Smart Scroll & FAB

The chat auto-scrolls when you're near the bottom. Scroll up to browse history and a ↓ FAB appears to jump back to latest instantly.

🔔

Badges & Read Receipts

Unread and mention badges update in real time. Check marks confirm delivered and read status for every message.

💡 Tips & Best Practices

Get the most out of Chat‑p2p V9 with these tips. No servers, no accounts — just open and chat.

🔐

Privacy by Design

There's no central server. Messages live in a GitHub repo and are only accessible to people who know the room name — keep it unique for private chats.

⚡

Smart Adaptive Sync

V9 uses tiered polling (fast when active, slow when idle) with debounced syncing so you get updates quickly without burning through API rate limits.

📱

Works Everywhere

Optimised for iOS, Android, and desktop. V9's responsive layout handles notches, floating keyboards, and landscape mode without any layout breaks.

🌟

Instant Invite

Share a room name with anyone — no sign-up, no install. They open the page, type the same room name, and they're in the conversation instantly.

🔄 Pull to refresh
